seoTitle: Austral Eden vs Avalon Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Austral Eden and Avalon Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Austral Eden vs Avalon Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Austral Eden and Avalon Beach.
heading: Austral Eden vs Avalon Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Austral Eden, New South Wales and Avalon Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Austral Eden has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Avalon Beach (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Austral Eden or Avalon Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Austral Eden has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Avalon Beach scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Austral Eden scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Avalon Beach scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Austral Eden or Avalon Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Austral Eden has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
